summary.zh: 范吉奥驾驶梅赛德斯-奔驰 W196 卫冕成功，但这一赛季因勒芒 24 小时耐力赛的重大灾难性事故而蒙上阴影，事故促使包括瑞士在内的多国此后长期禁止赛车运动。
summary.en: Fangio defended his title in the Mercedes-Benz W196, but the season was overshadowed by the catastrophic accident at the Le Mans 24 Hours, which led several countries, including Switzerland, to ban motor racing for decades.

content.zh: 范吉奥驾驶梅赛德斯-奔驰 W196 卫冕成功，但这一赛季因勒芒 24 小时耐力赛的重大灾难性事故而蒙上阴影，事故促使包括瑞士在内的多国此后长期禁止赛车运动。
content.en: Fangio defended his title in the Mercedes-Benz W196, but the season was overshadowed by the catastrophic accident at the Le Mans 24 Hours, which led several countries, including Switzerland, to ban motor racing for decades.
